codeReview.summary: The fix correctly re-points live rank lookups to the authoritative match participant summoner identifier while preserving fallback identifier derivation in the account/cache flow. The reviewed diff, handoff evidence, deployed worker route, and updated tests align with the feature requirements, and I did not find blocking or non-blocking code defects in the implemented scope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission shared state does not currently document that the deployed Riot proxy rank endpoint now attempts /lol/league/v4/entries/by-summoner/{identifier} first and falls back to /lol/league-exp/v4/entries/by-puuid/{identifier} on 403. That identifier/endpoint pairing was central to this fix and to the deferred live-rank validation feature.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker/src/index.ts:145-162 implements the by-summoner-first then by-puuid fallback behavior, but .factory/library/architecture.md only states that workers should switch to the correct current Riot endpoint/identifier pair when rank requests fail without recording the concrete runtime contract.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission library does not capture that /api/account now exposes a derived rankLookupId in addition to summonerId, even though the feature handoff relies on that field as the documented account/cache fallback for current-rank work.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: lib/types.ts:4-9 adds rankLookupId, lib/riot-api-service.ts:95-103 and 139-149 populate it, and the handoff states the account/cache flow now exposes this derived identifier, but .factory/library/architecture.md and .factory/library/environment.md do not mention it.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, commit 8cfd3dd, affected source files, and shared-state docs. The implementation satisfies the stated rank-wiring fix requirements, preserves truthful fallback behavior under the approved external-rank limitation, and I found no code issues that should fail the feature review.
